docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF VLADIMIR TALIMANTCHOUK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NABIL BEN AHMED GHALEB IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TALIMANTCHOUK, VLADIMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHALEB, NABIL BEN AHMED $2,070.70 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 INTEREST, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,180.70, MR. GHALEB WILL PAY $250 PER MONTH BY THE LAST DAY OF THE MONTH TO MR. TALIMANTCHOUK UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,070.07 FILED BY TALIMANTCHOUK, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT GHALEB, NABIL BEN AHMED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED JAN-21-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GHALEB, NABIL BEN AHMED
